entries.title: Removing brick edging and onion grass
entries.body: Early-stage site preparation. New soil will be imported and machinery sourced for the remaining removal work. For now, onion grass is being cleared manually by hand.

entries.title: Bulbs lifted and heeled in
entries.body: Removed the existing bulbs from the bed and relocated them to a holding spot on site, ready for replanting once the new layout goes in.

entries.title: Skip bin delivered
entries.body: Accepted delivery of a 6m³ skip bin on site for the removal waste.

entries.title: Mini loader booked
entries.body: Booked a mini loader for hire, available from next Tuesday (7 July), to move through the remaining removal work.

entries.title: Mini loader hired, site protected
entries.body: Picked up the Kanga mini loader from the hire depot. Purchased and laid asset protection materials across the grassed areas on site ahead of machine work, to keep the lawn from being damaged during excavation.

photos.caption: Kanga mini loader, picked up from the hire depot
Asset protection laid over grassed areas

entries.title: Excavation and removal begins
entries.body: With the loader on site and the lawn protected, excavation and removal work got underway. We also shared a behind-the-scenes look at the day on Instagram — some gardens begin with planting, this one begins with subtraction.

photos.caption: Shared on the Gardener & Son Instagram

entries.title: Second bed excavated, bin filled
entries.body: Continued excavation into the second garden bed. The skip bin is now filled and ready for pick-up tomorrow.

photos.caption: Excavation continues into the second bed
Skip bin filled, ready for pick-up

entries.title: Detailing excavation by hand
entries.body: Fine detailing of the excavation by hand, working in close around the areas the machine can't reach cleanly.

photos.caption: Misty morning over the adjacent green space

entries.title: English ivy and apple tree removed
entries.body: Removed English ivy (Hedera helix) from the fence line, and a Malus (apple tree) from the garden bed, clearing the way for the new planting layout.

photos.caption: English ivy (Hedera helix) removed from the fence line
Apple tree (Malus) removed from the garden bed

entries.title: Rock delivery and more asset protection
entries.body: Delivery of igneous habitat rocks arrived on site for the ecological garden. Picked up additional asset protection materials ahead of continued works.

photos.caption: More asset protection materials picked up

entries.title: Soil blend moved into garden beds
entries.body: Used the Kanga kid digger to move and blend the new soil mix through the garden beds.

photos.caption: Kanga kid digger blending soil into the beds
Garden beds filled with soil blend
Garden beds filled with soil blend
